Package ui

Class SimulationSnapshot

java.lang.Object
ui.SimulationSnapshot
public final class SimulationSnapshot extends Object
Immutable snapshot of the simulation state at one drone-event tick. Passed from SimulationRunner to VisualizationListener for rendering.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    SimulationSnapshot.NodeSnap
    Immutable snapshot of a single sensor node's state at one tick.
